name: eval datasets: every dataset file is valid UTF-8 and every line parses as JSON
command: find "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/datasets" -name "*.jsonl" | while read f; do node -e 'require("fs").readFileSync("'"$f"'","utf8").trim().split("\n").forEach(l=>JSON.parse(l))' || { echo "FAIL $f" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
